changelog: Bulk import + admin UI: (1) Storage.importFromStaticDB() — one-click import of all 3,853 GPS customers from customers-db.json (idempotent by CIF). (2) Admin panel — new '📥 นำเข้าลูกค้าจากฐานข้อมูลกลาง' button in Users tab. (3) Adds marker 📍 toggle + GPS-only filter button to map layer control (works alongside 🗺️/🛰️).
